snippet.title: Julius Mitchell - A Change is Gonna Come|  Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKAÔÇÖS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanÔÇÖs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKAÔÇÖS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice".

snippet.title: Watch NASAÔÇÖs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ÔÇô the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ÔÇô search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAÔÇÖs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj |  Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ÔÇÿ4 IdiotsÔÇÖ group
Thiruvannamalai Parai Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
ÔÇÿGeoshredÔÇÖ Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ÔÇÿPeiÔÇÖ Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G ÔÇô S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam ÔÇô R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed ÔÇô Diamond Babu

Lyric Video Edited by - Madhivanan VS
Lyric video by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

┬® 2021 SPI Music Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Janitha Nipun Bandara -Teri Deewani  | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKAÔÇÖS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice".

snippet.title: IPL 2021 Auction Tamil|Updated Squad List of all teams| CSK MI RCB RR DC KXIP KKR SRH|IPL NEWS TAMIL
snippet.description:
IPL 2021 Auction Tamil|Updated Squad List of all teams| CSK MI RCB RR DC KXIP KKR SRH|IPL NEWS TAMIL
IPL AUCTION 2021 TROLL | CSK TEAM PLAYERS LIST | PUJARA MOEEN ALI
IPL AUCTION 2021: FULL LIST of Players bought by IPL Teams CSK, MI, SRH, RCB, KXIP, KKR, DC & RR

#iplauction, #ipl2021, #iplauction2021

Morris becomes most expensive signing in IPL auction history
Chris Morris became the most expensive signing in IPL history on Thursday (February 18) with Rajasthan Royals forking out INR 16.25 crores for the South African all-rounder at the 2021 auction. The signing amount surpassed the INR 16 crore that Delhi Daredevils paid for Yuvraj Singh in 2015 - the previous record for a player signed at the auction.

The Royals entered the bid battle only at INR 10.25 crore mark after Mumbai Indians appeared to have wrested Morris from his previous employer - Royal Challengers Bangalore. The Jaipur franchise had to contend with another new bidder - the Punjab Kings - who entered at INR 13.50 crore and went all the way until INR 16 crore before pulling out.

The 33-year-old Morris has previously been a part of Rajasthan Royals, in the 2015 season when he scored 311 runs and took 13 wickets from 11 games. In all, he has played 70 IPL games and scored 551 runs at a strike-rate of 157.88 and taken 80 wickets at an economy of 7.81. Morris was an integral member of the RCB side last season even though an abdominal injury curtailed his participation to nine games. He took 11 wickets at an economy of 6.63. He hasn't played competitive cricket since.

snippet.description:
Sri Lanka Cricket today launched the ÔÇÿ2 KM Run Fitness TestÔÇÖ for the National Players to ascertain their fitness levels. Accordingly, 32 of the players out of a 36 member provisional squad training for the Tour of West Indies, which is under discussion, participated in the test, which was conducted at the Sugathadasa Stadium.

The new test, a standard method of determining the ÔÇÿFitness and EnduranceÔÇÖ levels of athletes, replaced the Yo-Yo method adopted by Sri Lanka Cricket. According to the new test, players were given a target of running the 2 Kilometer distance within a time frame of 8 minutes and 35 seconds.

snippet.title: Simran Emotional Scene || Best Scence || Heart Touching Emotional Scene || Best Heart Touching
snippet.description:
Simran Emotional Scene || Best Scence || Heart Touching Emotional Scene || Best Heart Touching

Simran Bagga (born Rishibhala Naval; 4 April 1976), known mononymously as Simran, is an Indian film actress, producer, classical dancer, model, and television personality. She has predominantly appeared in Tamil and Telugu films, as well as a few films in Hindi, Malayalam, and Kannada. She is well noted for her dancing and acting skills in the Indian film industry. In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

Although Simran initially aspired to become a fashion designer, she accepted offers to join the Indian film industry, which came as a result of her fame as an anchor in the show Superhit Muqabla. Having acted in a few Hindi films, she later achieved her first success with Tere Mere Sapne (1996) alongside Arshad Warsi. Subsequently, she made her debut in South Indian cinema through the Malayalam film Indraprastham (1996) and Kannada film Simhada Mari (1997). In the same year, she debuted in Tamil through V. I. P. (1997) and was followed by a string of commercial successes in her early career. In 1999, Simran received critical praise in the Tamil films Thulladha Manamum Thullum (1999) and Vaali (1999), establishing herself as the most successful actress in Tamil cinema at the time. At the peak of her career she agreed to play the role of an antagonist in Parthen Rasithen (2000) and a suffering woman from a premarital agreement in Priyamaanavale (2000), both went on to become commercial and critical successes.

Simran received her first Filmfare Award for Best Tamil Actress for Kannathil Muthamittal (2002),[3] as the mother of an adopted 9-year-old daughter. Simran had also appeared in two comedy films alongside Kamal Haasan; Pammal K. Sambandam and Panchathantiram, both released in 2002. In Telugu, Simran starred in a series of commercially successful films; Samarasimha Reddy (1999), Kalisundam Raa (2000) and Narasimha Naidu (2001), and for latter both, she received Filmfare Award for Best Telugu Actress nomination. Simran left the film industry following her marriage with her childhood family friend Deepak Bagga in 2004.[4] In 2008, she made a comeback to Tamil cinema with Vaaranam Aayiram, where she played a mother and a wife to the characters played by Suriya and won the Filmfare Award for Best Supporting Actress.[5]

In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
WeÔÇÖve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereÔÇÖs what we created. ArenÔÇÖt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letÔÇÖs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youÔÇÖll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ÔÇö How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ÔÇö DIY ring 

2:48 ÔÇö Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 ÔÇö DIY hair comb 

6:53 ÔÇö Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 ÔÇö DIY fake nails

snippet.title: Radhe Shyam Tamil Glimpse | Prabhas | Pooja Hegde | Radha Krishna Kumar | Justin Prabhakaran
snippet.description:
Radhe Shyam Tamil Movie Glimpse On UV Creations. #RadheShyam 2021 Indian Romantic Drama film ft. Rebel Star Prabhas and Pooja Hegde. Written and directed by Radha Krishna Kumar. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. Presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. The Movie is Shot simultaneously in Tamil, Telugu, Hindi and dubbed into Kannada and Malayalam.

Glimpse Background Score: Justin Prabhakaran

The epic love tale Radhe Shyam also stars Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others.

#RadheShyamGlimpse #Prabhas #PoojaHegde #RadhaKrishnaKumar #UVCreations #TSeries #Prabhas20 #RadheShyamTamilGlimpse #RadheShyamTeaser #RadheShyamTamilTeaser

Movie Details:

Movie: Radhe Shyam

Cast: Prabhas, Pooja Hegde, Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and others.

Written and Directed by Radha Krishna Kumar

Produced by UV Creations and T-Series

Presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies

Music: Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series

Sound Design: Resul Pookutty CAS, MPSE & Amrit Pritam Dutta, MPSE

Cinematography:  Manoj Paramahamsa

Music Theme: Mithoon

Art Director: Ravinder

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32ÔÇÖ to tie at one and added two more in the 65ÔÇÖ and 85ÔÇÖ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70ÔÇÖ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27ÔÇÖ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

#VadiveluComedy Ó«ÄÓ«ÁÓ«│Ó»ï Ó«¿Ó»çÓ«òÓ»ìÓ«òÓ«¥ Ó«òÓ»èÓ«ñÓ»ìÓ«ñÓ»ü Ó«ÁÓ«┐Ó«ƒÓ»ìÓ«ƒÓ»üÓ«¬Ó»ïÓ«»Ó»ìÓ«ƒÓ»ìÓ«ƒÓ«¥Ó«®Ó»ì, Ó««Ó«®Ó»üÓ«ÀÓ«®Ó»üÓ«òÓ»ìÓ«òÓ»ü Ó«¬Ó»üÓ«ñÓ»ü Ó«¬Ó»üÓ«ñÓ»ü Ó«ÁÓ«┐Ó«»Ó«¥Ó«ñÓ«┐Ó«»Ó«¥ Ó«ÁÓ«░Ó»üÓ«ñÓ»ç Ó«¿Ó«¥ Ó«ÄÓ«®Ó»ìÓ«® Ó«¬Ó«úÓ»ìÓ«úÓ»üÓ«ÁÓ»çÓ«®Ó»ì | Best Comedy Video HD| CheenaThaana

Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

MovieInfo:
Directed by T. P. Gajendran
Produced by Mid Valley
Story by Udayakrishna-Siby K. Thomas

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnÔÇÖt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneÔÇÖs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ÔÇö and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneÔÇÖs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonÔÇÖt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

snippet.title: Simran Blockbuster Full HD Movie | Hello Mama Dubbed Movie | Tamil Full Length Movies| Online Movies
snippet.description:
Simran Blockbuster Full HD Movie | Hello Mama Dubbed Movie | Tamil Full Length Movies| Online Movies

Simran Bagga (born Rishibhala Naval; 4 April 1976), known mononymously as Simran, is an Indian film actress, producer, classical dancer, model and television personality. She has predominantly appeared in Tamil and Telugu films, as well as a few films in Hindi, Malayalam and Kannada. She is well noted for her dancing and acting skills in the Indian film industry. In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

Although Simran initially aspired to become a fashion designer, she accepted offers to join the Indian film industry, which came as a result of her fame as an anchor in the show Superhit Muqabla. Having acted in a few Hindi films, she later achieved her first success with Tere Mere Sapne (1996) alongside Arshad Warsi. Subsequently, she made her debut in South Indian cinema through the Malayalam film Indraprastham (1996) and Kannada film Simhada Mari (1997). The same year, she debuted in Tamil through V. I. P. (1997) and was followed by a string of commercial successes in her early career. In 1999, Simran received critical praise in the Tamil films Thulladha Manamum Thullum (1999) and Vaali (1999), establishing herself as the most successful actress in Tamil cinema at the time. At the peak of her career she agreed to play the role of an antagonist in Parthen Rasithen (2000) and a suffering woman from a premarital agreement in Priyamaanavale (2000), both went on to become commercial and critical successes.

Simran received her first Filmfare Award for Best Tamil Actress for Kannathil Muthamittal (2002),[3] as the mother of an adopted 9-year-old daughter. Simran had also appeared in two comedy films alongside Kamal Haasan; Pammal K. Sambandam and Panchathantiram, both released in 2002. In Telugu, Simran starred in a series of commercially successful films; Samarasimha Reddy (1999), Kalisundam Raa (2000) and Narasimha Naidu (2001), and for latter both, she received Filmfare Award for Best Telugu Actress nomination. Simran left the film industry following her marriage with her childhood family friend Deepak Bagga in 2004.[4] In 2008, she made a comeback to Tamil cinema with Vaaranam Aayiram, where she played a mother and a wife to the characters played by Suriya and won the Filmfare Award for Best Supporting Actress.[5]

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ÔÇô Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
┬á
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ÔÇ£Godzilla vs. Kong,ÔÇØ the next epic adventure in LegendaryÔÇÖs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ÔÇ£Godzilla vs. KongÔÇØ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe. Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

snippet.title: BIG MOMENT | RAHUL GANDHI Join In Village Cooking | Mushroom Biryani | Village Cooking Channel
snippet.description:
Today we have a Big Moment. Rahul Gandhi Joining our cooking and he encouraged us a lot. 

Today we cook mushroom biryani recipe by using traditional and healthy ingredients. Rahul Gandhi Enjoying mushroom biryani by eating with us. We never forget this big moment in our life. Thank you so much Rahul sir for this great opportunity.
